mapper.select:
SELECT u.user_no AS USER_NO, u.user_id AS USER_ID, u.user_name AS USER_NAME, u.user_grade AS USER_GRADE, u.insa_code AS TEAM_CODE, g.team_name AS TEAM_NAME, u.user_email AS EMAIL, u.user_phone AS PHONE, u.acc_yn AS USE_YN, u.lock_status AS LOCK_YN, u.LOCK_DATE AS LOCK_DT, u.FAILED_COUNT AS LOGIN_FAIL_CNT, u.logindate AS LAST_LOGIN_DT, u.pwd_upt_dt AS PWD_CHANGE_DT, u.regdate AS REG_DT, NULL AS REG_USER, NULL AS MOD_DT, NULL AS MOD_USER FROM pi_user u LEFT JOIN pi_group g ON u.insa_code = g.insa_code WHERE 1=1
ORDER BY u.user_no DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pi_user u WHERE 1=1

SELECT u.user_no AS USER_NO, u.user_id AS USER_ID, u.user_name AS USER_NAME, u.user_grade AS USER_GRADE, u.insa_code AS TEAM_CODE, g.team_name AS TEAM_NAME, u.user_email AS EMAIL, u.user_phone AS PHONE, u.acc_yn AS USE_YN, u.lock_status AS LOCK_YN, u.LOCK_DATE AS LOCK_DT, u.FAILED_COUNT AS LOGIN_FAIL_CNT, u.logindate AS LAST_LOGIN_DT, u.pwd_upt_dt AS PWD_CHANGE_DT, u.regdate AS REG_DT, NULL AS REG_USER, NULL AS MOD_DT, NULL AS MOD_USER FROM pi_user u LEFT JOIN pi_group g ON u.insa_code = g.insa_code WHERE u.user_no = #{userNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pi_user ( user_no, user_id, password, user_name, user_grade, insa_code, user_email, user_phone, acc_yn, lock_status, FAILED_COUNT, pwd_upt_dt, regdate, startdate, enddate ) VALUES ( #{userNo}, #{userId}, SHA2(HEX(#{userPwd}), 256), #{userName}, #{userGrade}, #{teamCode}, #{email}, #{phone}, IFNULL(#{useYn}, 'Y'), IFNULL(#{lockYn}, 0), 0, NOW(), NOW(), #{startDate}, #{endDate} )
mapper.update: UPDATE pi_user SET user_name = #{userName}, user_grade = #{userGrade}, insa_code = #{teamCode}, user_email = #{email}, user_phone = #{phone}, acc_yn = #{useYn}, user_no = user_no WHERE user_no = #{userNo}
UPDATE pi_user SET password = SHA2(HEX(#{userPwd}), 256), pwd_upt_dt = NOW() WHERE user_no = #{userNo} AND password = SHA2(HEX(#{oldPassword}), 256)
UPDATE pi_user SET password = SHA2(HEX(#{userPwd}), 256), FAILED_COUNT = 0, lock_status = 0, LOCK_DATE = NULL, pwd_upt_dt = NOW(), pwd_reset_status = 1 WHERE user_no = #{userNo}
UPDATE pi_user SET lock_status = 1, LOCK_DATE = NOW() WHERE user_no = #{userNo}

UPDATE pi_user SET lock_status = 0, LOCK_DATE = NOW(), FAILED_COUNT = 0, logindate = DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-%d 00:00:00'), INTERVAL 3 MONTH), unlock_reason = NULL WHERE user_no = #{userNo}
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT g.insa_code AS teamCode, g.team_name AS teamName, g.up_idx AS parentCode, g.degree AS sortOrder, g.credate AS regDt FROM pi_group g WHERE g.team_name IS NOT NULL ORDER BY g.degree ASC, g.team_name ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pi_group ( insa_code, team_name, up_idx, degree, credate ) VALUES ( #{teamCode}, #{teamName}, #{parentCode}, #{sortOrder}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT IDX AS idx, `ENABLE` AS enable, UPDATE_LENGTH_CHK AS lengthChk, UPDATE_LENGTH AS passwordMinLength, PWD_COMPLICATION AS passwordComplexYn, UPDATE_PWD_CHK AS changeChk, UPDATE_PWD AS passwordExpireDays, USE_ID_LOCK_CHK AS useIdLockChk, USE_ID_LOCK AS accountLockDays, PWD_FAIL_CHK AS pwdFailChk, PWD_FAIL AS loginFailLimit, INCLUDE_PWD_ID AS includePwdId, PWD_CHANGE_CHK AS pwdChangeChk, PWD_CHANGE AS pwdChangeLimit, REGDATE AS regDt FROM pi_login_policy WHERE IDX = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE pi_login_policy SET `ENABLE` = #{enable}, UPDATE_LENGTH_CHK = #{lengthChk}, UPDATE_LENGTH = #{passwordMinLength}, PWD_COMPLICATION = #{passwordComplexYn}, UPDATE_PWD_CHK = #{changeChk}, UPDATE_PWD = #{passwordExpireDays}, USE_ID_LOCK_CHK = #{useIdLockChk}, USE_ID_LOCK = #{accountLockDays}, PWD_FAIL_CHK = #{pwdFailChk}, PWD_FAIL = #{loginFailLimit}, INCLUDE_PWD_ID = #{includePwdId}, PWD_CHANGE_CHK = #{pwdChangeChk}, PWD_CHANGE = #{pwdChangeLimit}, REGDATE = NOW() WHERE IDX = 0
